chunks.title: What are Transformers (Machine Learning Mo
chunks.text: No, it's not those transformers.

chunks.title: What are Transformers (Machine Learning Mo
chunks.text: But they can do some pretty cool things, let me show you.

chunks.title: What are Transformers (Machine Learning Mo
chunks.text: So why did the banana cross the road?

chunks.title: What are Transformers (Machine Learning Mo
chunks.text: Because it was sick of being mashed.

chunks.title: What are Transformers (Machine Learning Mo
chunks.text: I'm not sure that I quite get that one.

chunks.title: What are Transformers (Machine Learning Mo
chunks.text: And that's because it was created by a computer.

chunks.title: What are Transformers (Machine Learning Mo
chunks.text: I literally asked it to tell me a joke, and this is what it came up with.

chunks.title: What are Transformers (Machine Learning Mo
chunks.text: Apparently I used a GPT-3, or a Generative Pre-trained Transformer model.

chunks.title: What are Transformers (Machine Learning Mo
chunks.text: The 3 here means that this is the third generation.

chunks.title: What are Transformers (Machine Learning Mo
chunks.text: GPT-3 is an auto-regressive language model that produces text that looks like it was

chunks.title: What are Transformers (Machine Learning Mo
chunks.text: written by a human.

chunks.title: What are Transformers (Machine Learning Mo
chunks.text: A GPT-3 can write poetry, craft emails, and evidently come up with its own jokes.

chunks.title: What are Transformers (Machine Learning Mo
chunks.text: Off you go.

chunks.title: What are Transformers (Machine Learning Mo
chunks.text: Now, while our banana joke isn't exactly funny, it does fit the typical pattern of a joke

chunks.title: What are Transformers (Machine Learning Mo
chunks.text: with a setup and a punchline and sort of kind of makes sense.

chunks.title: What are Transformers (Machine Learning Mo
chunks.text: I mean, who wouldn't cross the road to avoid getting mashed?

chunks.title: What are Transformers (Machine Learning Mo
chunks.text: But look, GPT-3 is just one example of a transformer.

chunks.title: What are Transformers (Machine Learning Mo
chunks.text: Something that transforms from one sequence into another.

chunks.title: What are Transformers (Machine Learning Mo
chunks.text: And language translation is just a great example.

chunks.title: What are Transformers (Machine Learning Mo
chunks.text: Perhaps we want to take a sentence of, why did the banana cross the road?

chunks.title: What are Transformers (Machine Learning Mo
chunks.text: And we want to take that English phrase and translate it into French.

chunks.title: What are Transformers (Machine Learning Mo
chunks.text: Well, transformers consist of two parts.

chunks.title: What are Transformers (Machine Learning Mo
chunks.text: There is an encoder.

chunks.title: What are Transformers (Machine Learning Mo
chunks.text: And there is a decoder.

chunks.title: What are Transformers (Machine Learning Mo
chunks.text: The encoder works on the input sequence.

chunks.title: What are Transformers (Machine Learning Mo
chunks.text: And the decoder operates on the target output sequence.

chunks.title: What are Transformers (Machine Learning Mo
chunks.text: Now, on the face of it, translation seems like little more than just like a basic lookup task.

chunks.title: What are Transformers (Machine Learning Mo
chunks.text: So convert the why here of our English sentence to the French equivalent of pourquoi.

chunks.title: What are Transformers (Machine Learning Mo
chunks.text: But of course, language translation doesn't really work that way.

chunks.title: What are Transformers (Machine Learning Mo
chunks.text: Things like word order in terms of phrase often mix things up.

chunks.title: What are Transformers (Machine Learning Mo
chunks.text: And the way transformers work is through sequence to sequence learning,

chunks.title: What are Transformers (Machine Learning Mo
chunks.text: where the transformer takes a sequence of tokens, in this case, words in a sentence,

chunks.title: What are Transformers (Machine Learning Mo
chunks.text: and predicts the next word in the output sequence.

chunks.title: What are Transformers (Machine Learning Mo
chunks.text: It does this through iterating through encoder layers.

chunks.title: What are Transformers (Machine Learning Mo
chunks.text: So the encoder generates encodings that define which part of the input sequence are relevant to each other,

chunks.title: What are Transformers (Machine Learning Mo
chunks.text: and then passes these encodings to the next encoder layer.

chunks.title: What are Transformers (Machine Learning Mo
chunks.text: The decoder takes all of these encodings and uses their derived context to generate the output sequence.

chunks.title: What are Transformers (Machine Learning Mo
chunks.text: Now, transformers are a form of semi-supervised learning.

chunks.title: What are Transformers (Machine Learning Mo
chunks.text: By semi-supervised, we mean that they are pre-trained in an unsupervised manner,

chunks.title: What are Transformers (Machine Learning Mo
chunks.text: with a large unlabeled data set,

chunks.title: What are Transformers (Machine Learning Mo
chunks.text: and then they're fine-tuned through supervised training to get them to perform better.

chunks.title: What are Transformers (Machine Learning Mo
chunks.text: Now, in previous videos, I've talked about other machine learning algorithms that handle sequential input like natural language.

chunks.title: What are Transformers (Machine Learning Mo
chunks.text: For example, there are recurrent neural networks, or RNNs.

chunks.title: What are Transformers (Machine Learning Mo
chunks.text: What makes transformers a little bit different is that they do not necessarily process data in order.

chunks.title: What are Transformers (Machine Learning Mo
chunks.text: Transformers use something called an attention mechanism.

chunks.title: What are Transformers (Machine Learning Mo
chunks.text: And this provides context around items in the input sequence,

chunks.title: What are Transformers (Machine Learning Mo
chunks.text: so rather than starting our translation with the word why, because it's at the start of the sentence,

chunks.title: What are Transformers (Machine Learning Mo
chunks.text: the transformer attempts to identify the context that bring meaning in each word in the sequence.

chunks.title: What are Transformers (Machine Learning Mo
chunks.text: And it's this attention mechanism that gives transformers a huge leg up over algorithms like RNN that must run in sequence.

chunks.title: What are Transformers (Machine Learning Mo
chunks.text: Transformers run multiple sequences in parallel.

chunks.title: What are Transformers (Machine Learning Mo
chunks.text: And this vastly speeds up training times.

chunks.title: What are Transformers (Machine Learning Mo
chunks.text: So beyond translations, what can transformers be applied to?

chunks.title: What are Transformers (Machine Learning Mo
chunks.text: Well, document summaries, they're another great example.

chunks.title: What are Transformers (Machine Learning Mo
chunks.text: You can feed in a whole article as the input sequence,

chunks.title: What are Transformers (Machine Learning Mo
chunks.text: and then generate an output sequence that's going to really just be a couple of sentences that summarize the main points.

chunks.title: What are Transformers (Machine Learning Mo
chunks.text: Transformers can create whole new documents of their own, for example, like write a whole blog post.

chunks.title: What are Transformers (Machine Learning Mo
chunks.text: And beyond just language, transformers have done things like learn to play chess,

chunks.title: What are Transformers (Machine Learning Mo
chunks.text: and perform image processing that even rivals the capabilities of convolutional neural networks.

chunks.title: What are Transformers (Machine Learning Mo
chunks.text: Look, transformers are a powerful deep learning model,

chunks.title: What are Transformers (Machine Learning Mo
chunks.text: and thanks to how the attention mechanism can be paralyzed, are getting better all the time.

chunks.title: What are Transformers (Machine Learning Mo
chunks.text: And who knows, pretty soon maybe they'll even be able to pull off banana jokes that are actually funny.

chunks.title: What are Transformers (Machine Learning Mo
chunks.text: If you have any questions, please drop us a line below,

chunks.title: What are Transformers (Machine Learning Mo
chunks.text: and if you want to see more videos like this in the future, please like and subscribe.

chunks.title: What are Transformers (Machine Learning Mo
chunks.text: Thanks for watching.
